tests.description: Bidi domain name with a digit-first label is invalid
tests.comment: https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc5893#section-2 a label in a Bidi domain name must start with an L, R or AL character

tests.description: label starting with a digit before a right-to-left letter is invalid
left-to-right label containing a right-to-left letter is invalid
right-to-left label mixing both digit types is invalid
A-label that decodes to a disallowed code point is invalid
A-label that decodes to a Bidi rule violation is invalid
a U-label whose A-label form is longer than 63 octets is invalid
tests.comment: https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc5891#section-4.2.4 the 63-octet limit is on the A-label form, not the code point count
